PSA.23.2.gloss: He maketh me to lie down
PSA.23.2.definition: to crouch (on all four legs folded, like a recumbent animal); by implication, to recline, repose, brood, lurk, imbed

water; figuratively, juice; by euphemism, urine, semen

the right (natural, moral or legal); also (abstractly) equity or (figuratively) prosperity

bad or (as noun) evil (natural or moral)

support (abstractly), i.e., (figuratively) sustenance or (concretely) a walking-stick

PSA.23.5.definition: to set in a row, i.e., arrange, put in order (in a very wide variety of applications)

a table (as spread out); by implication, a meal
a front, i.e., part opposite; specifically a counterpart, or mate; usually (adverbial, especially with preposition) over against or before

PSA.23.5.gloss: me in the presence of mine enemies
PSA.23.5.definition: to cramp, literally or figuratively, transitive or intransitive
